Deck
Memo
Please join our syndicate Exitfund Ventures to access our exciting deal flow.
Synopsis
Sellara is an a16z-backed startup building AI-powered workflow automation for Wall Street. The 
company has reached $140K ARR across 3 enterprise clients, with one already live in production, and 
closed its fastest deal in just 4 weeks, far ahead of typical 9 to 18 month financial services 
procurement cycles. Sellara's proprietary AI engine achieves a 98% F1 score on trade reconciliation, 
outperforming generic LLM agents by 62% while running ~28x faster. Existing clients report 95% less Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 2/11

time spent on manual work and 40% headcount reduction in automated functions.
The platform replaces manual, fragmented front, middle, and back-office processes with configurable 
AI agents that automate trade capture, booking, allocations, reconciliations, settlements, compliance 
reporting, and P&L generation. Designed for regulated environments, Sellara includes approvals, 
validation checks, audit trails, scheduling, exception handling, and real-time monitoring. Each 
deployment generates proprietary workflow data and operational logic that improve model accuracy 
over time, creating a growing data moat.
Sellara has already beaten entrenched competitors in head-to-head evaluations, winning against 
Bloomberg, BNY Pershing, Salesforce, FIS Intellimatch, SmartStream, and Genesis, and replaced 7 
incumbent vendors at a single client (Able Noser, Hilltop, TAG, S3, Advent, SS&C Black Diamond, 
Envestnet). The pipeline includes 50+ warm introductions and at least 8 firms in advanced discussions, 
spanning institutions such as Citi, J.P. Morgan, Morgan Stanley, BlackRock, Vanguard, BNY, UBS, and 
Deutsche Bank.
The team is led by former Citi operators who collectively covered 600+ clients across every asset class 
over 10 years on trading desks. CTO Ahmad Roumie is a YC-backed founder (Rex, acquired) who 
trained and deployed AI for Fortune 500 companies including GE and Coca-Cola. Head of Product 
Sebastian Jolly held product roles at Oracle and Capital One after starting as an IBM engineer at age 
13.
Sellara is raising $5M through a SAFE at a $25M post-money valuation. The round is already 
oversubscribed with $6M in commitments and is backed by a16z, alongside prominent Wall Street 
investors.
Here are the reasons why we are excited to have secured an allocation in Sellara!
Proven Competitive Dominance: Sellara has won head-to-head against Bloomberg, BNY Pershing, 
Salesforce, FIS Intellimatch, SmartStream, and Genesis. One client replaced 7 incumbent vendors 
with Sellara as a single platform, consolidating reporting, allocations, and performance workflows. 
These are not pilot wins against startups; they are displacements of deeply entrenched enterprise 
incumbents.
Superior Technical Performance: Sellara's proprietary AI engine scores 98% F1 on trade 
reconciliation benchmarks, 62% better than the next-best general-purpose LLM agent. Average 
reconciliation latency is 3 seconds versus 85 to 176 seconds for GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, and 
Gemini 3.1 Pro agents. This is not a wrapper on a foundation model; it is a purpose-built system that 
outperforms generic AI on the specific tasks that matter.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 3/11

Massive Client-Reported ROI: Clients report 95% less time spent on manual work and 40% 
headcount reduction in automated functions. In a margin-pressured banking environment, these 
savings make the ROI easy for operations and finance leaders to justify, shortening sales cycles.
Fastest Enterprise Sales Cycles We Have Seen: Sellara closed its three enterprise clients in 3 
months, 2 months, and just over 4 weeks, respectively. Typical financial services procurement runs 9 
to 18 months. This pace suggests acute pain-point resonance and strong buyer urgency.
End-to-End Workflow Platform, Not a Point Solution: Unlike tools that solve one narrow task, Sellara 
offers a unified automation layer across trade capture, booking, allocations, reconciliations, 
settlements, compliance reporting, and P&L generation. This creates larger contract values, deeper 
integration, and stronger strategic importance within client organizations.
Powerful Data Flywheel: Every deployment generates proprietary workflow data, operational logic, 
and process outcomes that improve automation accuracy over time. The roadmap evolves from a 
workflow layer (live now) to cross-workflow expansion (1 to 3 months) to a proprietary model layer 
for on-prem deployment (9 to 12 months). Each solved workflow becomes reusable across clients, 
compounding platform performance.
Built-In Switching Costs and Retention: Once embedded into controls, reporting, reconciliations, and 
daily operations, Sellara becomes difficult to replace. The platform replaces multiple incumbent 
tools, which means ripping it out would require re-implementing several previously fragmented 
systems.
Blue-Chip Pipeline and Network Access: Sellara's pipeline includes 50+ warm introductions and at 
least 8 firms in advanced discussions, spanning Citi, J.P. Morgan, Morgan Stanley, BlackRock, 
Vanguard, BNY, UBS, Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Bank of America, Point72, 
Balyasny, Blackstone, Apollo, and others. This is exceptional top-of-funnel quality for a pre-Series A 
company.
Operator-Founded Team with Deep Domain Expertise: CEO Charles-André Jolly and COO S pencer 
Secord are former Citi operators who collectively covered 600+ clients across every asset class over 
10 years on trading desks. They built internal automation tools to reduce booking errors and improve 
reconciliations, giving them firsthand understanding of every pain point Sellara solves. CTO Ahmad 
Roumie is a YC-backed founder (Rex, acquired) who trained and deployed AI at GE, Coca-Cola, and 
ALDI, with a Master's in Robotics from ETH Zürich.
Strong Strategic Timing: Banks face rising costs, shrinking margins, compliance burdens, and talent 
constraints. Legacy trading systems, many untouched since 2005, create 25% lost PnL 
opportunities. AI workflow automation is moving from optional innovation to a strategic necessity, Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 4/11

and Sellara is positioned as the purpose-built solution.
Backed by a16z with Oversubscribed Round: Sellara is raising $5M at a $25M post-money valuation,
already oversubscribed with $6M in commitments. The round is backed by a16z, providing access to 
a16z's full platform, go-to-market support, and enterprise credibility alongside prominent Wall Street 
investors.
Problem
Manual, fragmented operations slow financial institutions and create avoidable risk:
Front, middle, and back-office teams spend significant time on manual data entry, verification, 
reconciliations, and report updates. Legacy systems, many untouched since 2005, create an 
estimated 25% in lost PnL opportunities.
Trades execute in seconds, but downstream processing often takes hours or days. Manual 
workflows increase the risk of errors, missed checks, losses, and compliance issues.
Critical processes depend on tribal knowledge stored in spreadsheets, emails, or a few experienced 
employees. Internal tools degrade as developers churn, and maintenance costs compound over time.
Traditional vendors still require internal ownership and ongoing IT involvement. Current AI solutions 
lack workflow context, and most homegrown systems become liabilities rather than assets.
Solution
Sellara provides AI-powered workflow automation for financial institutions:
Uses configurable AI agents to automate end-to-end workflows across front, middle, and back-
office functions, from trade capture through reconciliation and reporting.
Pulls data from existing systems, applies business rules, and executes tasks such as trade posting, 
allocations, settlements, and compliance reporting automatically.
Lets business users configure workflows through a no-code drag-and-drop interface, without 
requiring developer involvement.
Connects with existing systems including email, Bloomberg terminals, internal databases, and legacy 
enterprise software.
Includes validation checks, approvals, audit logs, scheduling, exception handling, and real-time 
monitoring for regulated environments.
Product
Sellara is a cloud-based AI workflow automation platform for financial institutions that allows clients to 
deploy configurable AI agents across operational processes and monitor them in real time.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 5/11

Key Features and Capabilities
End-to-End Automation: Automates linked workflows from trade capture through reconciliation and 
reporting.
Drag-and-Drop Workflow Builder: Business users define workflows without coding using a visual 
interface.
System Integrations: Connects with Outlook, Bloomberg, internal databases, and other enterprise 
tools.
Automated Validation and Audit Trails: Applies rules, approvals, and logs every action for compliance.
Scheduling and Triggers: Runs workflows on demand, on schedules, or based on operational events.
Security and Compliance Ready: Built for regulated environments with enterprise-grade controls and 
encryption.
How It Works
1. Identify: Sellara works with the client to select an initial workflow to automate and map required 
inputs and outputs.
2. Configure: The platform is connected to client systems, while users define rules, checks, and 
outputs in the UI.
3. Run: The workflow launches in production with monitoring, logging, and exception handling.
4. Review: Any anomalies are routed to human teams for oversight and resolution.
5. Expand: Additional workflows are deployed on the same platform using existing integrations.
Product Roadmap
Phase 1 - Workflow Layer (Live Now): Trade capture, reconciliation, and reporting. Automating high-
friction workflows end-to-end, embedded into daily operations.
Phase 2 - Expansion Layer (Next 1 to 3 Months): Expand across more workflows and deploy across 
desks and institutions. Each workflow adds to a proprietary dataset.
Phase 3 - Model Layer (Next 9 to 12 Months): Evolve into a specialized AI lab. Each workflow 
contributes to a proprietary dataset, delivered directly within customer workflows, with on-prem 
deployment capability.
Use Cases
Trade Capture, Booking, and Allocations: Automate the entry of executed trades into back-office 
systems and allocate them across portfolios or client accounts using predefined rules.
Reconciliations and Exception Management: Match trades, positions, and cash balances across 
systems, while routing anomalies to human teams for review.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 6/11

Settlements and Middle-Office Operations: Streamline post-trade handoffs between trading, 
operations, and finance teams to support faster settlements.
Compliance, Audit Logging, and Controls: Generate regulatory reports, maintain full audit trails, and 
enforce workflow approvals and validation checks automatically.
Reporting and P&L Automation: Produce daily or periodic P&L statements, dashboards, and 
management reports with improved speed and accuracy.
Enterprise Workflow Expansion: Extend the same platform across additional finance and operations 
workflows after initial deployment.
Traction
ARR: $140K across 3 enterprise clients, with one client already live in production.
Fast Enterprise Sales Cycles: Closed first client in 3 months, second in 2 months, and third in just 
over 4 weeks. Materially faster than typical 9 to 18 month financial services sales cycles.
Competitive Wins: Beat Bloomberg, BNY Pershing, and Salesforce at Client 1 (streamlined 
commissions and deal allocations). Replaced Able Noser, Hilltop, TAG, S3, Advent, SS&C Black 
Diamond, and Envestnet at Client 2 (consolidated reporting, allocations, and performance). Beat FIS 
Intellimatch, SmartStream, and Genesis at Client 3 (reconciliation and platform-level distribution 
opportunity).
Client Results: 95% less time spent on manual work and 40% headcount reduction in automated 
functions.
Technical Benchmarks: 98% F1 score on reconciliation (62% better than next-best LLM agent), with 
3-second average latency versus 85 to 176 seconds for generic AI agents.
Pipeline: 50+ warm introductions, at least 8 firms in advanced discussions. Network includes Citi, J.P. 
Morgan, Morgan Stanley, BlackRock, Vanguard, BNY, UBS, Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, Point72, 
Balyasny, Blackstone, Apollo, and others.
Business Model
Enterprise SaaS: Subscription-based pricing for financial institutions, structured by workflow 
deployments and user seats.
Pilot Fees: Upfront paid pilots used to qualify serious buyers and prove ROI before full contracts.
Land and Expand: Start with one workflow, then expand into additional use cases, teams, and seats 
within the same client.
Recurring Revenue: Annual contracts generate predictable software revenue from deployed 
workflows.
High Margins: Asset-light software model with strong gross margin potential and minimal 
incremental delivery cost.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 7/11

Tech Overview
Custom AI Engine: Proprietary AI built for structured financial workflows such as trade tickets, 
reconciliations, and reporting. Achieves 98% F1 score, outperforming GPT-5.4 (39%), Claude Opus 
4.6 (49%), and Gemini 3.1 Pro (60%).
Data Ingestion Layer: Parses raw inputs including emails, spreadsheets, and operational files without 
manual transcription.
Rules Engine: Combines AI with configurable business logic, validations, approvals, and exception 
handling.
Integration Layer: APIs and connectors link with email systems, Bloomberg terminals, databases, and 
legacy enterprise tools.
Secure Cloud Platform: Built for enterprise-grade security, reliability, uptime, and scalable 
transaction volumes.
Workflow Monitoring: Real-time dashboards, logs, and alerts for production workflow management.
Continuous Learning: Deployment data improves model performance, accuracy, and future workflow 
coverage over time.
Tech Defensibility/Moat
Proprietary Workflow Data: Each deployment generates valuable operational data and custom logic 
that improves the platform.
Domain-Specific Model: Purpose-built AI that outperforms general-purpose LLMs by 62% on 
financial reconciliation tasks.
Integration Lock-In: Deep embedding into client systems, controls, and reporting creates switching 
costs.
Horizontal Coverage: One platform supports multiple front, middle, and back-office workflows 
across institutions.
Expansion Flywheel: Success in one workflow makes additional deployments faster and easier within 
the same client.
Operational Trust: Auditability, controls, and compliance readiness strengthen long-term enterprise 
retention.
Go-to-Market Strategy
Land (Pilot Wedge): Target high-friction workflows and deliver ROI in weeks.
Expand (Within Institution): Add adjacent workflows such as allocations, reporting, and compliance. 
Expand from front office to middle office to back office with deeper integrations.
Standardize (Platform Adoption): Become embedded in daily operations and replace legacy 
workflows over time.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 8/11

Replicate (Across Industry): Each solved workflow becomes reusable across similar institutions, 
enabling rapid deployment at scale.
Network-Led Access: Founder relationships and investor networks generate warm introductions 
across major financial institutions.
Market Opportunity
Large and Growing TAM: The global market for AI and automation in banking was estimated at ~$43B 
in 2025 and is projected to reach ~$240B by 2033.
Back-Office Modernization Need: Transaction processing, reconciliations, reporting, onboarding, 
and post-trade workflows remain major cost centers with significant automation potential.
Broad Financial Services TAM: Beyond banks, brokerages, hedge funds, asset managers, insurers, 
and other financial institutions face similar workflow inefficiencies.
Strong Demand Tailwinds: Rising AI budgets, margin pressure, digital transformation initiatives, and 
increasing compliance requirements are accelerating adoption of automation platforms.
Competitive Analysis
RPA / BPM Vendors (UiPath, Blue Prism): Automate narrow tasks but require heavy IT 
implementation and lack trading-specific intelligence. No deep system integration, not built for 
trading operations.
In-House Automation: Banks use internal scripts, macros, and fragmented tools that degrade as 
developers churn. Maintenance compounds over time and most homegrown systems become 
liabilities.
Niche Fintech Solutions (FIS Intellimatch, SmartStream, Genesis): Solve specific reconciliation or 
compliance problems but do not offer full front-to-back workflow coverage. Sellara has beaten all 
three in head-to-head evaluations.
Cloud AI Providers (AWS, Azure, Generic GenAI): Offer components but not turnkey finance 
workflow automation. Lack workflow context and require significant internal build.
Legacy Enterprise Software (Bloomberg, Advent, SS&C): Manage records but do not automate 
complex multi-step workflows intelligently. Sellara has displaced these vendors at existing clients.
Competitive Edge
Measurable Technical Superiority: 98% F1 score, 62% better accuracy, and ~28x faster than generic 
LLM agents on financial reconciliation tasks.
Proven Head-to-Head Wins: Displaced Bloomberg, BNY Pershing, Salesforce, FIS Intellimatch, 
SmartStream, Genesis, and 7 incumbent vendors at a single client.
Full Front-to-Back Coverage: Only platform positioned as an end-to-end AI workflow layer across 
front, middle, and back-office functions.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
https://portal.angellist.com/r/s/exitfund-ventures/datarooms/seB-U1MyuRTk 9/11

SearchCompounding Data Advantage: Every deployment adds workflow data and logic that improve 
platform intelligence and future automation accuracy.
Operator Credibility: Built by former Citi operators who lived the exact pain points the product 
solves, enabling faster sales cycles and stronger client trust.
Team
Charles-André Jolly (Co-founder and CEO): Ex-Citi derivatives trader on the Macro Credit and Credit 
Sales desks, where he managed 80+ institutional clients and ~$4B in daily volume. Holds a Bachelor's 
degree in Finance from Georgetown University McDonough School of Business.
Ahmad Roumie (Co-founder and CTO): YC-backed founder who raised $800K for Rex.fit (acquired). 
Trained and deployed AI systems at Fortune 500 companies including GE and Coca-Cola, as well as 
ALDI. Holds a Master of Science in Robotics, Systems and Control from ETH Zürich. Previously at UC 
Berkeley.
Spencer Secord (Co-founder and COO): Spent six years at Citi in cross-asset sales with deep 
experience in trade booking and reconciliation. Built internal automation tools for reconciliations and 
booking error reduction. Holds a Bachelor's degree in Finance from Georgetown University.
Sebastian Jolly (Co-founder and Head of Product): Started as an IBM engineer at age 13, later held 
product roles at Oracle, Capital One, and other startups. Holds a Bachelor of Science in Operations 
and Analytics from Georgetown University.
Funding
Rights: Pro-rata rights available.
Use of Funds and Milestones:
Expand engineering capacity to accelerate product development, deployments, and enterprise 
implementation timelines.
Drive seven-figure ARR growth through upselling existing clients and converting a growing 
qualified pipeline.
Establish Sellara as a core workflow automation platform embedded across multiple functions 
within financial institutions over the next 12 months.
All documents

Note from Exitfund Ventures
Implementation Complexity: Financial workflows are highly intricate and client-specific. Heavy 
customization could slow deployments and limit scalability, particularly as the company moves 
beyond its initial 3 clients.
Accuracy and Trust Risk: Banks require near-zero errors for risk-critical workflows. Any workflow 
mistakes, missed exceptions, or reconciliation failures could quickly reduce client confidence and 
threaten retention.
Note from AngelList
The estimated fees are based on the anticipated allocation, and as such, may change before the 
closing due to a variety of factors, such as the amount raised or any unforeseen add-on costs. See a 
breakdown of further potential add-on costs here.Confidential: Disclosing deal information will result in removal from AngelList5/15/26, 1:28 PM Sellara Inc | AngelList
